briefs.title: WorkSafeBC Updates Helmet and Respirator Safety Standards for BC Workplaces
briefs.summary: WorkSafeBC is updating BC's workplace safety rules in two stages. Starting April 1, 2026, two additional helmet standards will be accepted for cycling and skating at work, and respirator (breathing protection) standards will be upgraded from outdated versions to the current 2018 CSA standard. Starting January 4, 2027, new rules around combustible dusts (fine particles that can catch fire or explode) and compressed air use will also take effect.
briefs.action_required: Review and replace any respirators and helmets that only meet old standards before April 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: WorkSafeBC helmet and respirator standard updates take effect
WorkSafeBC combustible dust and compressed air rules take effect

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Natural Resources, Labour & Employment
